strengths: 15+ years of full-stack engineering with consistent TypeScript and Node.js focus across recent senior roles at re:cinq and Optilyz, directly matching the primary stack; AWS CDK and Kubernetes/Docker experience covers the cloud and containerization requirements.

Explicitly built AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq — MCP code generators and frameworks supporting agentic workflows — directly satisfying the role's 'experience with AI agent development' requirement, which many candidates are unlikely to meet.

Deep, career-long testing culture: authored two D-language testing frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), taught TDD and Selenium courses, and practised TDD/pairing/CI at RIDE Capital — a strong foundation that transfers readily to Vitest and the team's quality standards.
concerns: Nest.js is not mentioned anywhere in the resume; while Node.js backend architecture is extensive, there is no evidence of familiarity with Nest.js conventions, decorators, or module system.

Current career gap since October 2025 (~9 months at time of review) means the candidate has not been in active production work for roughly three quarters; recency of hands-on experience with the latest toolchain versions should be validated.

Kotlin is listed as a secondary requirement and Java appears only in a brief robotics context at Altom (2016–2018); no recent JVM backend experience is evident, which may limit contribution to those select services.
response.justification: Bogdan brings a rare combination of deep TypeScript/Node.js fullstack seniority and hands-on AI agent and MCP tooling experience — precisely the profile this role demands — backed by a consistent track record of quality engineering (TDD, code reviews, open-source frameworks) across well-regarded Berlin tech companies. The career gap is the main variable to probe, but given the breadth of his background and the specificity of his AI agent work at re:cinq, he is a credibly strong fit for the senior-level scope and the emerging-technology expectations of this position.
